segments.title:
AI 时代不写代码
而是写意图
segments.summary: 代码已经从机器码 → 汇编 → 高级语言一路抽象上来，下一层抽象是用自然语言表达意图。AI 把意图编译成代码，人不再去改编译产物。
segments.cover_prompt: A developer at a glowing terminal, intent flowing as light into the screen, cinematic vertical composition, modern soft tech aesthetic, rich blues and amber

segments.title:
代码是编译产物
不应再手工修改
segments.summary: 把 AI 生成的代码当成汇编/机器码——它是从你自然语言 prompt 编译下来的产物，bug 应在 prompt 层修，不在产物层修。
segments.cover_prompt: Layers of abstraction stacked vertically — natural language at the top, source code in the middle, machine code at the bottom — connected by glowing arrows, soft schematic style
